cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which present Eve ends up with after all the swaps. Let me start by tracking each person's gift step by step. First, the initial gifts are: - Alice: green present - Bob: white present - Claire: black ball - Dave: orange ball - Eve: yellow present Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap one by one. First swap: Bob and Alice swap. So after this swap: - Alice now has Bob's white present. - Bob now has Alice's original green present. So after first swap: Alice: white Bob: green Claire: black Dave: orange Eve: yellow Second swap: Alice and Eve swap. So Alice gives her white present to Eve, and Eve gives her yellow to Alice. After second swap: Alice: yellow Bob: green Claire: black Dave: orange Eve: white Third swap: Claire and Eve swap. Claire has black ball, Eve has white present. After swapping: Claire gets white present, Eve gets black ball. After third swap: Alice: yellow Bob: green Claire: white Dave: orange Eve: black Fourth swap: Alice and Dave swap.
